calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2003 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2003 Continued To May-16-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 27, 2003
Off Calendar Mar-27-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. M. Wilkinson Troy, Esq. represented Plaintiff, American Revenue Management, Inc. The Court noted for the record that default was entered against Hassan Kangarloo and individual and dbs Hassan & Associates on December 31, 2002. Robert A. Koch, Chief Credit Officer for American-California Bank was sworn and examined. The Court receives evidence and good cause appearing, grants judgment in favor of the Plaintiff as follows: Principal: $50,000.00; Prejudgment Interest: $15,393.90; Attorney Fees: $2,000.00; Costs: $316.00 for a total judgment of $67,709.90. Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2003 Continued To Mar-28-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
